# Bermuda LLC — Complete Documentation

> InsurTech company specializing in insurance automation for 10+ years. Bermuda empowers insurance agencies with real-time rating, agentic AI workflows, carrier data integration, and lead automation.

**Tagline:** Sell more with automation
**Website:** https://www.thebermuda.us
**Contact:** info@thebermuda.us | (512) 428-8740
**Address:** 13101 Preston Rd. Ste 110, Dallas, TX 75240

---

## What We Do

- **Bermuda Rater** — Real-time rating engine and integration platform for carriers, MGAs, and agencies
- **Instant Auto & Home Quotes** — Generate quotes in seconds through an intuitive web app
- **Carrier Downloads** — Real-time data integration and policy management
- **Client Portals** — Self-service platforms with payment automation
- **Lead Management** — Real-time lead integration and automation with top providers
- **Agentic AI Solutions** — AI-powered automation for quoting, binding, payments, and servicing

## Key Stats

- 1,000+ agents using our solutions
- 50,000+ monthly quotes processed
- 100,000+ active policies managed
- 10+ years of insurance domain expertise
- Saves 40+ hours per month on repetitive operations

---

# Products & Rating Solutions

**Page:** https://www.thebermuda.us/#product

## Bermuda Rater

A rating engine and integration platform for carriers, MGAs, and agencies. Enables real-time quote generation, API connections, and automated workflows powering customer portals and AMS systems.

**Who is it for?** Insurance carriers, MGAs, agency owners, and digital agencies building insurance technology. Integrates with rating APIs, CRMs, conversion tools, and document systems.

**Try it:** https://demo.quotes.thebermuda.us

### Key Features

#### Instant Quotes
Auto & Home quotes obtainable through an intuitive web app interface. Seamless, stress-free experience for agents and customers.

#### Mobile Compatible
On-the-go access with effortless navigation and quote retrieval on any mobile device.

#### Real-time Leads
Fresh, high-quality leads delivered directly into the online quoting web app. Competitive sales advantage with instant lead-to-quote conversion.

#### Power of Integration
Unified approach eliminating data silos for efficient insurance sales management. API-first, modular architecture.

#### Customizable Coverage Packages
Configure coverage options per state, per carrier, per line of business.

#### Multi-State Quoting
Bermuda Rater works in any state the agency operates in. It connects to the agency's preferred real-time rater and their active carriers — so quoting availability is driven by the agency's own setup, not platform limitations.

### Supported Rating APIs

- TurboRater
- Direct Binding
- Additional quoting engines available upon request (modular architecture)

### Platform Capabilities

- API-first modular architecture
- Webhook and automation frameworks
- State-specific configurations (active states, coverage requirements, zip-code-based routing)
- Customizable per underwriting preferences
- Open Transaction API for proprietary system integration

---

# Agentic AI Solutions

**Page:** https://www.thebermuda.us/agentic-ai.html

Bermuda's Agentic AI automates repetitive insurance workflows end-to-end, replacing manual tasks with reliable, tireless AI agents.

### Real-Time Quoting Automation
Instantly generate quotes with precision. Eliminates manual data entry and accelerates the quoting process.

### Policy Binding & Synchronization
Policies bind rapidly while maintaining consistent data across all platforms. No human intervention needed.

### Automated Payment Processing
Simplify and secure payments with intelligent, error-free automation. Reduces processing errors and speeds up transactions.

### Seamless Carrier Uploads
Integrates with low-tech carrier portals — a major industry advancement. Documents upload and synchronize across carrier systems automatically.

### AI-Powered Servicing Agents
Replace repetitive human tasks with AI agents that handle routine servicing requests, freeing your team for strategic work.

## How It Works

1. **Data Collection** — Customer data is collected and feeds automated quote generation
2. **Quote & Bind** — Policies bind and payments process without human intervention
3. **Sync & Upload** — Documents upload and synchronize across carrier systems automatically

## Benefits

- Reduces human error through AI-driven processes
- Delivers consistency and accuracy in data handling
- Works with legacy systems and outdated carrier portals
- Enables teams to focus on strategic growth rather than routine tasks
- Saves 40+ hours per month on repetitive operations

---

# Carrier Downloads

**Page:** https://www.carrierdownloads.com

Real-time data integration and policy management platform. Works with any carrier the agency is appointed with, in any state they operate in.

## Real-Time Data Integration
Policy adjustments and payment updates flow directly from carriers, keeping agencies synchronized with customers. Prevents churn by ensuring data is always current.

## Master and Manage Your Data
Take control of your information with tools focused on data accuracy and integrity. All carrier data in one place.

## Enhanced Customer Satisfaction

- Advanced customer tracking
- Churn prevention features
- Real-time interaction insights
- Proactive need addressing

## Accelerate Operations

- Faster financial reporting
- Streamlined transaction processing
- Simplified agency management
- Handles both day-to-day and complex tasks

## Key Benefits

- Real-time sync ensures billing and policy data is always current
- Crucial for automation and delivering great customer service
- Eliminates manual data entry from carrier portals
- Single source of truth for all policy data

# Integrations

**Page:** https://www.thebermuda.us/#integration

Bermuda connects with 30+ platforms and services. Our API-first architecture enables seamless integration with your existing tools.

## Lead Providers

Native real-time connections — leads are automatically fetched, validated, and instantly quoted.

- **EverQuote** — Real-time lead delivery and quoting
- **QuinStreet** — Automated lead integration
- **QuoteWizard** — Instant lead receipt and enrichment
- **SmartFinancial** — Real-time lead connection
- **MediaAlpha** — Lead integration and automation

Each provider has customizable mapping logic, validation rules, workflows, filters, enrichment, deduplication rules, and quote handling.

## CRM Integrations

Data flows automatically bidirectionally via webhooks and APIs.

- NowCerts
- InsuredMine
- FreshWorks
- Velocify
- InsurancePro
- Additional CRMs available

## Workflow & Automation

- **Zapier** — Connect Bermuda Rater with thousands of applications, no-code automation
- **Open Webhooks** — Custom automation for customer creation, quote routing, notifications

## Communication

- **Twilio SMS** — Automated text messaging for customer engagement
- **SendGrid** — Customizable email notifications and marketing (configurable sender, reply-to, branded communications)
- **Podium** — 2-way SMS messaging, lead engagement, review collection

## Data Prefill Services

Auto-populate customer data to reduce manual entry:

- TransUnion
- Fenris
- DCS (Data Collection Services)
- Public Data APIs
- TurboRater Autofill (Home)

## Analytics & Tracking

- **Google Analytics** — User activity tracking and conversion metrics
- **Mouseflow** — Visual session replays and heatmaps for user behavior analysis
- **Improvely** — Lead origin tracking and marketing attribution

## Customer Support

- **Freshchat** — Real-time customer support chat for agency sites
- **Intercom** — Chat integration
- **Podium** — Text communication and reputation management

## Accounting

- **QuickBooks** — Insurance transaction tracking synced for taxes and financial statements
- **Microsoft Dynamics GP** — Financial system integration
- **Oracle NetSuite** — Enterprise accounting sync

Policy, payment, and report data sync to your financial systems.

## Other

- **Google reCAPTCHA** — Form security
- **Sentry** — Error monitoring
- **BrowserStack** — Cross-browser testing
- **Direct Binding** — Policy binding via integrated rating APIs
- **Custom Integration** — Connect AI apps to legacy systems via our Open Transaction API

# Pricing

**Page:** https://www.thebermuda.us/#pricing

All plans include a 1-month free trial.

## Basic — $249/month

Best for small agencies with few locations operating in one state.

- 1 Business Line (Auto)
- Single State Quotes
- Page personalization
- Email/SMS Notifications
- 249 quotes per month
- Paid data and click leads access

## Business — $499/month

Best for growing multi-state agencies.

- 1 Business Line (Auto)
- Multi-State Quotes
- Customizable Coverage Packages
- Embed 3rd Party JavaScripts
- 999 quotes per month
- Paid data and click leads access

## Enterprise — Custom Pricing

Best for agencies with custom workflows and multiple data sources.

- Real-time Rater Integration
- Auto & Home Lines
- Online Policy Purchase
- Prefill & Public Data Services
- Open API/Webhooks access
- Unlimited monthly quotes
- Paid data and click leads access

**Get Started:** info@thebermuda.us | (512) 428-8740 | https://demo.quotes.thebermuda.us

---

# Frequently Asked Questions

**Page:** https://www.thebermuda.us/#faqs

## General

**What is Bermuda Rater?**
A rating engine and integration platform for carriers, MGAs, and agencies enabling real-time quote generation, API connections, and automated workflows powering customer portals and AMS systems.

**Who is it for?**
Insurance carriers, MGAs, agency owners, and digital agencies building insurance technology. Integrates with rating APIs, CRMs, conversion tools, and document systems.

## Rating & Quoting

**What rating APIs are supported?**
TurboRater and Direct Binding, with modular architecture enabling additional quoting engines upon request.

**Can I get quotes for multiple states?**
Yes. Bermuda Rater works in any state the agency operates in — it integrates with the agency's preferred real-time rater and their active carriers. Multi-state quoting is available on Business and Enterprise plans.

## Integrations

**What CRM integrations are available?**
NowCerts, InsuredMine, FreshWorks, Velocify, InsurancePro, and others. Data flows automatically bidirectionally via webhooks and APIs.

**Does it support external data prefilling?**
Yes, through Prefill Data API accessing TransUnion, Fenris, DCS, and public records, reducing data entry friction.

**What other integrations are supported?**
Twilio, SendGrid, Google Analytics, Mouseflow, Freshchat, Improvely, Podium, Zapier, Gmail, Google reCAPTCHA, Sentry, BrowserStack, and more.

**Does it integrate with accounting software?**
Yes — QuickBooks, Microsoft Dynamics GP, Oracle NetSuite. Policy, payment, and report data sync to financial systems.

## Lead Management

**Which real-time lead providers are supported?**
EverQuote, QuinStreet, QuoteWizard, SmartFinancial, and MediaAlpha. Leads are automatically fetched, validated, and instantly quoted.

**How does lead integration work?**
Leads are received via secure API or webhook. The platform immediately pre-fills data, runs quotes using configured rating providers, and optionally routes to CRM/AMS.

**Can I customize per lead provider?**
Yes. Each provider has mapping logic, validation rules, workflows, provider-specific filters, enrichments, deduplication rules, and quote handling — all configurable.

**What happens with incomplete lead data?**
The platform supports prefill from TransUnion, Fenris, and public data APIs for auto-completion. Configurable fallback logic flags non-compliant leads.

**Can it auto-respond to leads?**
Yes. Automated responses via SMS (Twilio), email (SendGrid), or webhook to CRM post-quote generation.

## Communication

**What chat tools are compatible?**
Intercom, Freshchat, and Podium integrations enable direct agent interaction on quoting portals.

**Can I customize email settings?**
Yes. SendGrid is fully customizable — From Email Address, From Name, Reply-To Address. Supports branded, authenticated communications.

**Can I use Podium for SMS instead of Twilio?**
Yes. Podium is an alternative for 2-way messaging, lead engagement, and review collection. Selectable during onboarding.

## Automation & Customization

**Does it support workflow automation?**
Yes. Zapier or open Webhook frameworks automate customer creation, quote routing, and notifications. No-code solutions available.

**How customizable is the platform?**
Fully modular and API-first. Integrations are configurable, webhooks customizable, and proprietary systems can connect via the Open Transaction API.

## Technical

**What are the DNS/hosting requirements?**
Domain DNS configuration pointing to Bermuda-hosted portal. Domain authentication for email via SendGrid and live deployment URLs.

**Does it support state-specific configurations?**
Yes. Active states, coverage requirements, zip-code-based routing — all customizable per underwriting preferences.

**What analytics and tracking tools are available?**
Mouseflow provides heatmaps and session recording. Improvely enables conversion tracking and lead attribution analysis. Google Analytics for user activity and conversions.

---

# Privacy Policy & Terms

**Privacy:** https://www.thebermuda.us/privacy.html | **Terms:** https://www.thebermuda.us/terms.html

Bermuda LLC collects personal information only when voluntarily provided. Mobile information and text messaging opt-in data are never shared with third parties for marketing purposes. Texas state law applies. Contact: info@thebermuda.us
